episodes.title: The Oprah cult that killed 3 people
episodes.description:
In this video I talk rise and fall of the self help product called The Secret. I talk about the cult-like following that started after Oprah Windfrey's show had A lady on it to promote her self help manifestation book called the Secret. I talk about how it went on to be a major problem and how the other people in the book promoted scams. I talk about how it recieved backlash back then and how Joe rogan talked about it with hulk hogan and how it's today a TikTok trend and stuff.
